title: rhamnus × calcicola
intro: Rhamnus × calcicola, also known as the hybrid buckthorn or calcicole buckthorn, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus frangula. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it was used to treat various health conditions. Rhamnus × calcicola contains anthraquinone glycosides, which have been found to have a laxative effect and are used to treat constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of dried leaves and bark, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
